functions-assets.html.title: Assets
functions-assets.html.contents: @function imageUrl() Returns the full URL for an image file Parameters & Return $filename: (String) The name of the image file @return (String) The full URL of the image file @error #{$filename} does not exist. Requires $image-path (string)

functions-colours.html.title: Colours
functions-colours.html.contents: @function darker-shade() Darkens a given color by a specified percentage. Parameters & Return $colour: (Color) The base color to darken. $percentage: (Number) The percentage to darken the color by. @return (Color) The darkened color. @error Unsupported color format: #{$colour}. @function lighter-shade() Lightens a given color by a specified percentage. Parameters & Return $color: (Color) The base color to lighten. $percentage: (Number) The percentage to lighten the color by. @return (Color) The lightened color. @error Unsupported color format: #{$colour}.

functions-spacing.html.title: Spacing
functions-spacing.html.contents: Calculates a responsive value using the clamp function, which ensures that the padding value remains within the specified minimum and maximum values as the viewport width changes. Parameters & Return $min-value: (Number) The minimum padding value (in px, em, rem, etc.) to be used when the viewport width is at or below the minimum width defined by the project. $max-value: (Number) The maximum padding value to be used when the viewport width is at or above the maximum width defined by the project. @return (String) A CSS clamp expression that adjusts the padding value based on the viewport width, ensuring it is responsive within the defined range.

functions-units.html.title: Units
functions-units.html.contents: @function strip-unit() Remove the unit of a length Parameters & Return $number: (Number) The number to remove the unit from @return (Number) The unitless number Used By @function rem() @function rem() Converts a given px value to rem units Parameters & Return $value: (Number|String) The value to convert, can be unitless or with units @return (String) The value converted to rem. @error Invalid value: #{$value}. Expected a unitless value or a value with units. Requires @function strip-unit() $font-root-size (number) Used By @mixin focused() @mixin focused-box() @function em() Converts a given px value to em units Parameters & Return $value: (Number|String) Value in px $context-font-size: (Number) Font size of the element, defaulted to root font size @return (Number) Value in ems @error Invalid value: #{$value}. Expected a unitless value or a value with units. Requires @function strip-unit() @function is-em() Checks if a given value is in ‘em’ units. Parameters & Return $value: (Number) The value to be checked. @return (Number|Boolean) Returns the value if it is in ‘em’ units, otherwise returns false. @function is-rem() Checks if a given value is in ‘rem’ units. Parameters & Return $value: (Number) The value to be checked. @return (Number|Boolean) Returns the value if it is in ‘rem’ units, otherwise returns false. @function is-px() Checks if a given value is in ‘px’ units. Parameters & Return $value: (Number) The value to be checked. @return (Number|Boolean) Returns the value if it is in ‘px’ units, otherwise returns false.

functions-zindex.html.title: Z-Index
functions-zindex.html.contents: @function zIndex() Get a z-index value from the z-index map. Parameters & Return $key: (String) The key to use in the z-index map. @return (Number) The z-index value. Requires $z-index-map (map) Used By @mixin z-index()

index.html.title: portfolio Documentation
index.html.contents: Portfolio Website 2025 This is my new portfolio website created using NextJS & Payload CMS Technologies Used NextJS SCSS Payload CMS TypeScript

mixins-accessibility.html.title: Accessibility
mixins-accessibility.html.contents: @mixin focused() Applies focused styles to a link by adding an underline to the text. Example scss .element:focus-visible { @include focused; } css compiled .element:focus-visible { background-color: var(--focus-bg-clr); box-decoration-break: clone; box-shadow: 0 -0.12rem var(--focus-bg-clr), 0 0.25rem var(--focus-text-clr); color: var(--focus-text-clr); outline: 0.19rem solid transparent; text-decoration: none; text-shadow: none; transition: box-shadow var(--transition-duration-fast) linear; } Requires @function rem() $focus-width (number) @mixin focused-box() Applies focused styles to an boxed element by adding an outline and box-shadow. Example scss .element:focus-visible { @include focused-box; } css compiled .element:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.19rem hsl(207, 40%, 17%), 0 0 0 0.38rem hsl(191, 72%, 51%); outline: 0.19rem solid transparent; } Requires @function rem() $focus-text-color (Color) $focus-background-color (Color) $focus-width (number)

mixins-layout.html.title: Layout
mixins-layout.html.contents: @mixin generate-col-span() Generates a grid column span mixin Parameters $max: (Number) The maximum number of columns to span Examples scss @include generate-col-span(4); css compiled .col-span-1 { grid-column: span 1; } .col-span-2 { grid-column: span 2; } .col-span-3 { grid-column: span 3; } .col-span-4 { grid-column: span 4; } scss .block { @include generate-col-span(3); } css compiled .block .col-span-1 { grid-column: span 1; } .block .col-span-2 { grid-column: span 2; } .block .col-span-3 { grid-column: span 3; } @mixin content-grid() This mixin is used to create a grid layout with a responsive content area with a maximum width. It also has the ability to create full-width sections. It is mainly used in the header, footer, and main sections of the page. Example scss main { @include content-grid; } css compiled main { display: grid; grid-template-columns: [full-width-start] minmax(var(--padding-inline), 1fr) [content-start] min(100% - var(--padding-inline) * 2, var(--content-max-width)) [content-end] minmax(var(--padding-inline), 1fr) [full-width-end]; transition: padding var(--transition-duration-fast); } main > :not(.full-width) { grid-column: content; } main > .full-width > :not(.full-width) { grid-column: content; } main > .full-width { display: grid; grid-column: full-width; grid-template-columns: inherit; padding-block: var(--layout-row-spacing); } A mixin for generating media queries based on breakpoints, units, and custom media features. It supports breakpoints defined in various units (em, rem, px) or as named keys from a breakpoints map.The mixin allows configuration of min-width, max-width, min-height, or max-height queries,and it optionally supports additional conditions such as orientation. Parameters & Return $value: (Number|String) The breakpoint value or key from the bp.$breakpoints-map. Can be a numeric value (e.g., 768px) or a named key from the breakpoints map (e.g., 'medium'). $type: min (String) The type of media query. Options: 'min' or 'max'. Defaults to 'min'. $media-feature: width (String) The feature to target. Options: 'width' or 'height'. Defaults to 'width'. $orientation: null (String) An optional orientation condition. Options: 'portrait' or 'landscape'. Defaults to null (no orientation condition). @content (code block) - The CSS rules to apply within the media query. @error An error if an invalid or missing breakpoint value is provided. Example scss // Using a key from the breakpoints map (default: min-width) @include mq('md') { .example { color: blue; } } // Using an explicit max-width query @include mq('md', 'max') { .example { color: red; } } // Using a custom breakpoint value @include mq(768px) { .example { font-size: 1.2rem; } } // Adding an orientation condition @include mq('md', $orientation: 'landscape') { .example { color: green; } } // Targeting height instead of width @include mq(1024px, $media-feature: 'height') { .example { background-color: yellow; } } css compiled @media screen and (min-width: 64em) { .example { color: blue; } } @media screen and (max-width: 64em) { .example { color: red; } } @media screen and (min-width: 768px) { .example { font-size: 1.2rem; } } @media screen and (min-width: 64em) and (orientation: landscape) { .example { color: green; } } @media screen and (min-height: 1024px) { .example { background-color: yellow; } }

mixins-zindex.html.title: Z-Index
mixins-zindex.html.contents: @mixin z-index() Mixin to set the z-index of an element. Parameters $key: (string) The key of the z-index value to set. Examples Set the z-index of an element to the value of the “base” key. .foo { @include z-index(); } Set the z-index of an element to the value of the “header” key. .foo { @include z-index("header"); } Set the z-index of an element to the value of the “modal” key. .bar { @include z-index("modal"); } Set the z-index of an element to the value of the “alert” key. .bar { @include z-index("alert"); } Requires @function zIndex()

settings-animation.html.title: Animation
settings-animation.html.contents: $transition-duration (number) scss $transition-duration: 0.4s; Transition duration This is used for transitions between different states of an element. $transition-duration-fast (number) scss $transition-duration-fast: 0.3s; Transition duration (fast) This is used for transitions between different states of an element. $transition-duration-slow (number) scss $transition-duration-slow: 0.6s; Transition duration (slow) This is used for transitions between different states of an element.

settings-assets.html.title: Assets
settings-assets.html.contents: $assets-path (string) scss $assets-path: '/assets/' !default; Path to the assets public directory with trailing slash. This is where static assets such as images and font subdirectories live. $image-path (string) scss $image-path: '#{$assets-path}images/' !default; Path to public images folder with a trailing slash. Used By @function imageUrl()

settings-borderradius.html.title: Border Radius
settings-borderradius.html.contents: $borderRadius (map) scss $borderRadius: ( 'small': rem(16), 'medium': rem(24), 'large': rem(32), 'circle': 50%, ); Border Radius This is used for border radius throughout the project.

settings-colours.html.title: Colours
settings-colours.html.contents: $colour-palette (map) scss $colour-palette: ( 'aero': hsla(191, 72%, 51%, 1), 'ocean-deep': hsla(196, 61%, 38.92%, 1), 'prussian-blue': hsla(207, 40%, 17%, 1), 'baby-powder': hsla(60, 14%, 97%, 1), 'ivory-mist': hsla(40, 13%, 97%, 1), 'ash-cloud': hsla(0, 0%, 65%, 1), 'stormy-slate': hsla(215, 11%, 43%, 1), 'white': hsla(0, 0%, 100%, 1), 'frosted-sage': hsla(60, 7%, 86%, 1), 'urban-steel': hsla(220, 2%, 61%, 1), 'bittersweet': hsl(8.05deg, 100%, 67.8%, 1), 'old-gold': hsla(47.1deg, 73.1%, 57.6%, 1), 'concrete': hsla(60, 7%, 95%, 1), 'gallery': hsla(60, 9%, 93%, 1), 'light-grey': hsl(0, 0%, 85%), 'fresh-leaf': rgb(69, 200, 91), 'cherry-punch': hsla(355, 80%, 55%, 1), 'amber-glow': hsla(35, 100%, 50%, 1), ); Colour Palette - A map of the project colour palette. $project-colours (map) scss $project-colours: ( primary: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'ocean-deep')), secondary: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'prussian-blue')), accent: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'aero')), 'ivory': generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'ivory-mist')), ash: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'ash-cloud')), light: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'baby-powder')), slate: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'stormy-slate')), frosted-sage: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'frosted-sage')), urban-steel: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'urban-steel')), old-gold: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'old-gold')), bittersweet: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'bittersweet')), concrete: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'concrete')), gallery: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'gallery')), 'light-grey': generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'light-grey')), fresh-leaf: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'fresh-leaf')), cherry-punch: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'cherry-punch')), amber-glow: generate-shades(map.get($colour-palette, 'amber-glow')), ); $success-background-color (Color) scss $success-background-color: map.get($project-colours, 'fresh-leaf', 350) !default; Success background color $error-background-color (Color) scss $error-background-color: map.get($project-colours, 'cherry-punch', 500) !default; Error background color $warning-background-color (Color) scss $warning-background-color: map.get($project-colours, 'amber-glow', 400) !default; Warning background color $focus-background-color (Color) scss $focus-background-color: map.get($project-colours, 'accent', 400) !default; Focus background color Used By @mixin focused-box() $focus-text-color (Color) scss $focus-text-color: map.get($project-colours, 'secondary', 400) !default; Focus text color Used By @mixin focused-box() $font-body-color (Color) scss $font-body-color: map.get($project-colours, secondary, 400) !default; Body text colour The colour used for body text $font-body-color-light (Color) scss $font-body-color-light: map.get($project-colours, light, 400); Light body text colour The colour used for body text on darker backgrounds $font-subtitle-color (Color) scss $font-subtitle-color: map.get($project-colours, ash, 400); Subtitle font colour Colour used for subtitles or taglines $font-card-color (Color) scss $font-card-color: map.get($project-colours, slate, 400) !default; Card font colour Colour used for card text $font-print-colour (Color) scss $font-print-colour: #000 !default; Print Text Colour The default color for text in print materials, set to black if not overridden. $selection-bg-color (Color) scss $selection-bg-color: map.get($project-colours, accent, 400) !default; Selection Colour The colour used for text selection $selection-text-contrast-color (Color) scss $selection-text-contrast-color: map.get($project-colours, bittersweet, 400) !default; Selection Text Contrast Colour The colour used for text selection contrast

settings-layout.html.title: Layout
settings-layout.html.contents: $project-max-width (number) scss $project-max-width: 1230px; Max width of the site layout in PX, if needed we can strip out the unit. $project-min-width (number) scss $project-min-width: 320px; Min width of the site layout in PX, if needed we can strip out the unit. $container-max-width (number) scss $container-max-width: 1118px; Max width of the inner container in PX $padding-inline-base (number) scss $padding-inline-base: 24px; Inline padding $padding-block-base (number) scss $padding-block-base: 12px; Padding block $section-spacing-base (number) scss $section-spacing-base: 56px; Section spacing This is the spacing between sections. $section-spacing-desktop (number) scss $section-spacing-desktop: 104px; Section spacing This is the spacing between sections on desktop screens. $block-spacing-base (number) scss $block-spacing-base: 32px; Block spacing This is the spacing between blocks. $block-spacing-desktop (number) scss $block-spacing-desktop: 72px; Block spacing on desktop screens $focus-width (number) scss $focus-width: 3px !default; Border width of focus outline Used By @mixin focused() @mixin focused-box() $input-padding-base (number) scss $input-padding-base: 8px !default;

settings-shadows.html.title: Shadows
settings-shadows.html.contents: $shadows (map) scss $shadows: ( 'card': 0 rem(12) rem(16) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05), 'button-sm': 0 rem(2) rem(8) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), 'button': 0 rem(8) rem(16) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), 'button-lg': 0 rem(16) rem(16) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), 'menu': 0 rem(4) rem(12) rgba(hsla(207, 40%, 17%, 1), 0.2), 'large-title': rem(2) rem(2) rem(12) rgba(7, 46, 70, 0.5), 'large-body': rem(1) rem(1) rem(2) rgba(28, 48, 65, 0.5), 'small-title': rem(2) rem(2) rem(6) rgba(7, 46, 70, 0.5), 'small-body': rem(2) rem(2) rem(2) rgba(28, 48, 65, 0.5), ); Shadows This is used for shadows throughout the project.

settings-typography.html.title: Typography
settings-typography.html.contents: Typography font scale This scale includes font size calculations for text based on viewport width and other settings $font-root-size (number) scss $font-root-size: 16px !default; Root font size This is used to calculate rem and em sizes across the project. Used By @function rem() $font-smallest-size (number) scss $font-smallest-size: 14px !default; Smallest font size This is the smallest font size used across the project. $font-desktop-size-sm (number) scss $font-desktop-size-sm: 20px !default; Small desktop font size This is the smaller body font size featured on desktop screens. $font-desktop-size (number) scss $font-desktop-size: 24px !default; Desktop font size This is the body font size used for desktop screens. $heading-font-size-sm (number) scss $heading-font-size-sm: 32px !default; Heading font size small The smaller heading font size $heading-font-size (number) scss $heading-font-size: 40px !default; Heading font size The base font size for headings. $heading-font-size-lg (number) scss $heading-font-size-lg: 100px !default; Heading font size large The large heading font size, used for heroes and page titles $sub-heading-font-size (number) scss $sub-heading-font-size: $heading-font-size-md !default; Sub-heading font size The font size for sub headings or taglines $section-heading-font-size (number) scss $section-heading-font-size: $heading-font-size-sm !default; Section heading font size The font size for section headings $card-title-font-size (number) scss $card-title-font-size: $heading-font-size !default; Card title font size The font size for card titles $card-body-font-size (number) scss $card-body-font-size: $font-desktop-size-sm !default; Card body font size The font size for card bodies $hero-title-font-size (number) scss $hero-title-font-size: $heading-font-size-lg !default; Hero font size The font size for hero text $button-font-size (number) scss $button-font-size: $font-desktop-size-sm !default; Button font size The font size for buttons $max-paragraph-width (number) scss $max-paragraph-width: 60ch !default; Paragraph Max Width This is the max width for paragraphs to maintain legibility

settings-zindex.html.title: Z-Index
settings-zindex.html.contents: $z-index-map (map) scss $z-index-map: ( 'background': -1, 'base': 1, 'backdrop': 10, 'tooltip': 100, 'header': 200, 'menu': 300, 'menu-content': 350, 'modal': 400, 'alert': 500, 'loading': 600, ); Z-index map - A map of z-index values for different elements. Used By @function zIndex()
